summary: Added a brief end-of-chapter bridge clarifying that Arthur successfully files Elsie's declaration at clinic intake after first light and that the returned waterproof sleeve is repurposed at the swollen back door, tightening continuity into Chapter 18 without altering chapter causality.
edits: Added first-light dispatch beat confirming Arthur rides Elsie's declaration to clinic once water drops.
Added intake-status detail (logged/stamped) to stabilize administrative handoff into next chapter.
Added final physical-placement beat for the waterproof sleeve at the back door to match Chapter 18 object continuity.
